first_week_ratio.glossary: The amount of your study activity that happens in the first week.

weekend_ratio.glossary: The proportion of your study activity that you do on weekends.

revisit_ratio.glossary: How often you revisit older materials (not the one you just saw).

max_consecutive_days.glossary: Your longest streak of studying on consecutive days.

regularity_ratio.glossary: The consistency and regularity of your study sessions.

num_active_days.glossary: The total number of unique days you have been active in the course.

activity_slope.glossary: The trend of your activity over time (a higher value means less of a drop-off).

total_sessions.glossary: The total number of study sessions you have started (starts separated by >30 min).

avg_clicks_per_item.glossary: The average number of times you interact with each course item.

avg_delta_t_sec.glossary: The average time (in seconds) you spend between clicks.

mid_course_ratio.glossary: The proportion of your work done in the second half of the course compared to the first half (measures 'acceleration' or 'desertion').

num_unique_items.glossary: The number of unique course items you have accessed.

coverage_ratio.glossary: The percentage of unique course materials you have visited.

night_owl_ratio.glossary: The proportion of your activity that occurs late at night.

std_dev_hour_session_start.glossary: The variation in the time of day you start studying.

zapping_ratio.glossary: How often you switch between resources very quickly (in just a few seconds).

ratio_short_breaks.glossary: The proportion of your study breaks that are very short.

progress_ratio.glossary: Your overall rate of progressing through the course materials.

total_clicks.glossary: The total number of clicks you've made in the course.

percentile_80_delta_t.glossary: The 80th percentile of time between your clicks (fewer very long pauses is better).

activity_span_days.glossary: The total number of days between your first and last activity.

fixation_ratio.glossary: The tendency to focus your activity on a small set of items.

avg_inactive_days.glossary: The average number of days you go without studying.

std_dev_daily_clicks.glossary: The variation in your number of clicks from day to day (less variation is better).

procrastination_ratio.glossary: The tendency to concentrate your study activity near deadlines.

backward_prereq_ratio.glossary: How often you return to the immediately preceding resource (can signal confusion).
